cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out the problem. So we have five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Then they trade books in a sequence of swaps. The question is asking who ends up with which book, specifically what book Dave has at the end. Let me track the book each person has after each swap. Initially: - Alice has Moby Dick - Bob has Ulysses
